description_en: A tangible cultural property (yukei bunkazai) in the crafts category, a Matsuoka ware blue-and-white large dish. Municipally designated by Yuzawa City on 1967-05-30.
A tangible cultural property (yukei bunkazai) in the crafts category, a suit of armor with a horizontal-plate barrel-sided cuirass. Municipally designated by Yuzawa City on 1964-03-26.

name_en: Sword Guard with Autumn-Leaf Viewing Design
description_en: A tangible cultural property (yukei bunkazai) in the crafts category, a sword guard (tsuba) decorated with an autumn-leaf viewing motif. Municipally designated by Yuzawa City on 1969-12-19.

name_en: Standing Statues of the Six Jizo
description_en: A tangible cultural property (yukei bunkazai) in the sculpture category, standing statues of the Six Jizo. Municipally designated by Yuzawa City on 2004-02-12.

name_en: Wooden Standing Statue of Sho Kannon Bodhisattva
description_en: A tangible cultural property (yukei bunkazai) in the sculpture category, a wooden standing statue of Sho Kannon. Municipally designated by Yuzawa City on 1995-03-01.

name_romaji: Mokuzō Fudō Myōō Zō oyobi Nidōji Ryūzō

description_en: A tangible cultural property (yukei bunkazai) in the sculpture category, a wooden statue of Fudo Myoo and two attendant boys. Municipally designated by Yuzawa City on 1971-03-15.

name_en: Standing Statue Attributed as Thousand-Armed Kannon
description_en: A tangible cultural property (yukei bunkazai) in the sculpture category, a standing statue traditionally identified as the Thousand-Armed Kannon. Municipally designated by Yuzawa City on 1968-12-23.

name_en: Statues Handed Down at the Sanzugawa Ten Kings Hall
description_en: A tangible cultural property (yukei bunkazai) in the sculpture category, a group of statues transmitted at the Ten Kings hall. Municipally designated by Yuzawa City on 1968-12-23.

A tangible cultural property (yukei bunkazai) in the painting category, a painting of the Willow-Branch Kannon. Municipally designated by Yuzawa City on 1969-12-19.
